title: The Legendary 'Tai Fei'
original_title: 古惑仔激情篇之洪興大飛哥
overview: Tai Fei discovers he has a son, and soon realizes that he is a triad member involved in the Tung Sing gang which deals in narcotics.

trailers.title: Kio 妈咪? Call Tai Fei 来 better lah!

trailer_groups.title: Kio 妈咪? Call Tai Fei 来 better lah!

en.title: Kio 妈咪? Call Tai Fei 来 better lah!
